### 🔧 Monitor Tuning Recommendations (learned)

| Monitor | Issue | Evidence (fires / weeks / auto-res) | Recommended change (before → after) | Confidence | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [**135119948**](https://app.datadoghq.com/monitors/135119948) — HPA sustained high utilization (env:prod) | Infra saturation that autoscaling already handles. | 3 fires this wk (Warn, auto-resolved ~6–10 min); recurring. | **Route HIGH → LOW.** before: sustained-utilization → `@webhook-incidentio-high`. after: route the branch → `@webhook-incidentio-low`; keep OOM/not-ready at HIGH. _Coverage preserved:_ a real pin still pages HIGH. _Impact:_ removes ~3 pages/wk. | High — recurring, 100% self-resolve. | <custom data-type="status" data-id="id-0">recommend</custom> |
| [**119674469**](https://app.datadoghq.com/monitors/119674469) — service-postman-internal high average latency (env:prod) | Transient gRPC latency spikes that self-recover. | 2 fires this wk, both auto-resolved ~5–11 min. | **Add a sustain window.** before: >0.5s avg over last_10m → alert. after: require last_10m → last_15m or a min-duration sustain. _Coverage preserved:_ sustained latency still alerts. _Impact:_ removes transient blips. | Medium — recurring transient. | <custom data-type="status" data-id="id-1">recommend</custom> |
